subcodes.first_line: O Baqir! Upon thee be My glory! Thy letter, which thou didst send through Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin, hath reached Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر علیک بهائی نامه شما که نزد زین المقربین ارسال نمودی امام وجه حاضر قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
